name: vmaf_tiny_transnet_v2_v1
notes: TransNet V2 shot-boundary detector (T6-3a-followup). 100-frame window of 27x48 RGB thumbnails -> per-frame shot-boundary logits. Real upstream weights from Soucek & Lokoc 2020 (MIT). Wrapper transposes NTCHW->NTHWC and selects only the single-frame logits output; ColorHistograms's rank-2 UnsortedSegmentSum rewritten to ScatterND for ONNX opset-17 compatibility. See ADR-0261 + docs/ai/models/transnet_v2.md.
